content.query:
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

Alter PROC [EDW].[SP_ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD] AS
BEGIN

/*
	-- Clear the staging table to prevent duplicate processing
TRUNCATE TABLE [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD_DATA_STAGING];

-- Insert deduplicated data into the staging table
INSERT INTO [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD_DATA_STAGING] (
    [FIRST_NAME],
    [LAST_NAME],
    [ASSOCIATE_ID],
    [JOB_TITLE_DESCRIPTION],
    [WORK_CONTACT_WORK_EMAIL],
    [FLSA_DESCRIPTION],
    [PAY_CLASS],
    [PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP],
    [DIVISION],
    [PAY_DATE],
    [TIME_IN],
    [TIME_OUT],
    [HOURS],
    [EARNINGS_CODE],
    [WORKED_DEPARTMENT],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER],
    [TIMECARD_WORKED_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER_DESCRIPTION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_FHIA_BJS_LOCATIONS],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_GO_SOUTHERN_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_MADCITY_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_MAXHOME_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_SERVICE_ID],
    [TIMECARD_WORKED_SERVICE_ID_DESCRIPTION],
    [APPROVE],
    [APPROVE_SUPERVISOR_NAME],
    [InsertedDate],
    [ref_file],
    [Benefits_Eligibility_Class_Description]
)

*/

SELECT 
    [FIRST_NAME],
    [LAST_NAME],
    [ASSOCIATE_ID],
    [JOB_TITLE_DESCRIPTION],
    [WORK_CONTACT_WORK_EMAIL],
    [FLSA_DESCRIPTION],
    [PAY_CLASS],
    [PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP],
    [DIVISION],
    [PAY_DATE],
    [TIME_IN],
    [TIME_OUT],
    [HOURS],
    [EARNINGS_CODE],
    [WORKED_DEPARTMENT],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER],
    [TIMECARD_WORKED_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER_DESCRIPTION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_FHIA_BJS_LOCATIONS],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_GO_SOUTHERN_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_MADCITY_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_MAXHOME_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_SERVICE_ID],
    [TIMECARD_WORKED_SERVICE_ID_DESCRIPTION],
    [APPROVE],
    [APPROVE_SUPERVISOR_NAME],
    [InsertedDate],
    [ref_file],
    [Benefits_Eligibility_Class_Description],
    [Reports_To_AssociateID]
	
INTO #T_ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD_DATA_STAGING

FROM (
    SELECT 
        [FIRST_NAME],
        [LAST_NAME],
        [ASSOCIATE_ID],
        [JOB_TITLE_DESCRIPTION],
        [WORK_CONTACT_WORK_EMAIL],
        [FLSA_DESCRIPTION],
        [PAY_CLASS],
        [PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP],
        [DIVISION],
        [PAY_DATE],
        [TIME_IN],
        [TIME_OUT],
        [HOURS],
        [EARNINGS_CODE],
        [WORKED_DEPARTMENT],
        [TIMECARD_WORK_LOCATION],
        [TIMECARD_WORK_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER],
        [TIMECARD_WORKED_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER_DESCRIPTION],
        [TIMECARD_WORK_FHIA_BJS_LOCATIONS],
        [TIMECARD_WORK_GO_SOUTHERN_LOCATION],
        [TIMECARD_WORK_MADCITY_LOCATION],
        [TIMECARD_WORK_MAXHOME_LOCATION],
        [TIMECARD_WORK_SERVICE_ID],
        [TIMECARD_WORKED_SERVICE_ID_DESCRIPTION],
        [APPROVE],
        [APPROVE_SUPERVISOR_NAME],
        [InsertedDate],
        [ref_file],
        [Benefits_Eligibility_Class_Description],
        [Reports_To_AssociateID],
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY [ASSOCIATE_ID], [PAY_DATE], [TIME_IN]
            ORDER BY CAST(
            CONCAT(
                SUBSTRING([ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', [ref_file]) + 5, 2),  -- Year (YY)
                SUBSTRING([ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', [ref_file]) + 1, 2),  -- Month (MM)
                SUBSTRING([ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', [ref_file]) + 3, 2),  -- Day (DD)
                SUBSTRING([ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', [ref_file]) + 7, 2),  -- Hour (HH)
                SUBSTRING([ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', [ref_file]) + 9, 2),  -- Minute (MM)
                SUBSTRING([ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', [ref_file]) + 11, 2)  -- Second (SS)
            ) AS BIGINT
        ) DESC
    ) AS rn
    FROM [ods].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD_DATA]
) AS RankedSource
WHERE rn = 1;


UPDATE Target
SET 
    [FIRST_NAME] = Staging.[FIRST_NAME],
    [LAST_NAME] = Staging.[LAST_NAME],
    [JOB_TITLE_DESCRIPTION] = Staging.[JOB_TITLE_DESCRIPTION],
    [WORK_CONTACT_WORK_EMAIL] = Staging.[WORK_CONTACT_WORK_EMAIL],
    [FLSA_DESCRIPTION] = Staging.[FLSA_DESCRIPTION],
    [PAY_CLASS] = Staging.[PAY_CLASS],
    [PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP] = Staging.[PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP],
    [DIVISION] = Staging.[DIVISION],
    [TIME_OUT]=staging.time_out,
    [HOURS] = Staging.[HOURS],
    [EARNINGS_CODE] = Staging.[EARNINGS_CODE],
    [WORKED_DEPARTMENT] = Staging.[WORKED_DEPARTMENT],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_LOCATION] = Staging.[TIMECARD_WORK_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER] = Staging.[TIMECARD_WORK_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER],
    [TIMECARD_WORKED_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER_DESCRIPTION] = Staging.[TIMECARD_WORKED_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER_DESCRIPTION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_FHIA_BJS_LOCATIONS] = Staging.[TIMECARD_WORK_FHIA_BJS_LOCATIONS],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_GO_SOUTHERN_LOCATION] = Staging.[TIMECARD_WORK_GO_SOUTHERN_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_MADCITY_LOCATION] = Staging.[TIMECARD_WORK_MADCITY_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_MAXHOME_LOCATION] = Staging.[TIMECARD_WORK_MAXHOME_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_SERVICE_ID] = Staging.[TIMECARD_WORK_SERVICE_ID],
    [TIMECARD_WORKED_SERVICE_ID_DESCRIPTION] = Staging.[TIMECARD_WORKED_SERVICE_ID_DESCRIPTION],
    [APPROVE] = Staging.[APPROVE],
    [APPROVE_SUPERVISOR_NAME] = Staging.[APPROVE_SUPERVISOR_NAME],
    [InsertedDate] = Staging.[InsertedDate],
    [ref_file] = Staging.[ref_file],
    [Benefits_Eligibility_Class_Description]=Staging.[Benefits_Eligibility_Class_Description],
    [Reports_To_AssociateID]=Staging.[Reports_To_AssociateID]
FROM [edw].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD_DATA] AS Target
INNER JOIN #T_ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD_DATA_STAGING AS Staging
ON Target.[ASSOCIATE_ID] = Staging.[ASSOCIATE_ID]
   AND Target.[PAY_DATE] = Staging.[PAY_DATE]
   AND Target.[TIME_IN] = Staging.[TIME_IN]
AND CAST(
        CONCAT(
            SUBSTRING(Staging.[ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', Staging.[ref_file]) + 5, 2),  -- Year (YY)
            SUBSTRING(Staging.[ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', Staging.[ref_file]) + 1, 2),  -- Month (MM)
            SUBSTRING(Staging.[ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', Staging.[ref_file]) + 3, 2),  -- Day (DD)
            SUBSTRING(Staging.[ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', Staging.[ref_file]) + 7, 2),  -- Hour (HH)
            SUBSTRING(Staging.[ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', Staging.[ref_file]) + 9, 2),  -- Minute (MM)
            SUBSTRING(Staging.[ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', Staging.[ref_file]) + 11, 2)  -- Second (SS)
        ) AS BIGINT
    ) >= CAST(
        CONCAT(
            SUBSTRING(Target.[ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', Target.[ref_file]) + 5, 2),  -- Year (YY)
            SUBSTRING(Target.[ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', Target.[ref_file]) + 1, 2),  -- Month (MM)
            SUBSTRING(Target.[ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', Target.[ref_file]) + 3, 2),  -- Day (DD)
            SUBSTRING(Target.[ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', Target.[ref_file]) + 7, 2),  -- Hour (HH)
            SUBSTRING(Target.[ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', Target.[ref_file]) + 9, 2),  -- Minute (MM)
            SUBSTRING(Target.[ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', Target.[ref_file]) + 11, 2)  -- Second (SS)
        ) AS BIGINT
    );



INSERT INTO [edw].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD_DATA] (
    [FIRST_NAME],
    [LAST_NAME],
    [ASSOCIATE_ID],
    [JOB_TITLE_DESCRIPTION],
    [WORK_CONTACT_WORK_EMAIL],
    [FLSA_DESCRIPTION],
    [PAY_CLASS],
    [PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP],
    [DIVISION],
    [PAY_DATE],
    [TIME_IN],
    [TIME_OUT],
    [HOURS],
    [EARNINGS_CODE],
    [WORKED_DEPARTMENT],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER],
    [TIMECARD_WORKED_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER_DESCRIPTION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_FHIA_BJS_LOCATIONS],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_GO_SOUTHERN_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_MADCITY_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_MAXHOME_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_SERVICE_ID],
    [TIMECARD_WORKED_SERVICE_ID_DESCRIPTION],
    [APPROVE],
    [APPROVE_SUPERVISOR_NAME],
    [InsertedDate],
    [ref_file],
    [Benefits_Eligibility_Class_Description],
    [Reports_To_AssociateID]
)
SELECT 
    [FIRST_NAME],
    [LAST_NAME],
    [ASSOCIATE_ID],
    [JOB_TITLE_DESCRIPTION],
    [WORK_CONTACT_WORK_EMAIL],
    [FLSA_DESCRIPTION],
    [PAY_CLASS],
    [PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP],
    [DIVISION],
    [PAY_DATE],
    [TIME_IN],
    [TIME_OUT],
    [HOURS],
    [EARNINGS_CODE],
    [WORKED_DEPARTMENT],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER],
    [TIMECARD_WORKED_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER_DESCRIPTION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_FHIA_BJS_LOCATIONS],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_GO_SOUTHERN_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_MADCITY_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_MAXHOME_LOCATION],
    [TIMECARD_WORK_SERVICE_ID],
    [TIMECARD_WORKED_SERVICE_ID_DESCRIPTION],
    [APPROVE],
    [APPROVE_SUPERVISOR_NAME],
    [InsertedDate],
    [ref_file],
    [Benefits_Eligibility_Class_Description],
    [Reports_To_AssociateID]
FROM #T_ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD_DATA_STAGING AS Staging
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM [edw].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD_DATA] AS Target
    WHERE Target.[ASSOCIATE_ID] = Staging.[ASSOCIATE_ID]
      AND Target.[PAY_DATE] = Staging.[PAY_DATE]
      AND Target.[TIME_IN] = Staging.[TIME_IN]
);
END
GO
